text:
A member of the authority is not entitled to compensation for service on the authority but is entitled to reimbursement for expenses incurred in performing the member’s duties at the rate provided by the General Appropriations Act.

Transferred, redesignated and amended from Vernon’s Civil Statutes, Section 4, Art/Sec 4413(37) by Acts 2019, 86th Leg., R.S., Ch. 594 (S.B. 604 ), Sec. 5.11, eff. September 1, 2019.
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 7
### Chapter 1006. Motor Vehicle Crime Prevention Auth.
##### § 1006.058 — Reimbursement for Expenses

A member of the authority is not entitled to compensation for service on the authority but is entitled to reimbursement for expenses incurred in performing the member’s duties at the rate provided by the General Appropriations Act.

Transferred, redesignated and amended from Vernon’s Civil Statutes, Section 4, Art/Sec 4413(37) by Acts 2019, 86th Leg., R.S., Ch. 594 (S.B. 604 ), Sec. 5.11, eff. September 1, 2019.
